	rm openjdk.tgz*; 		apt-mark auto '.*' > /dev/null; 	[ -z "$savedAptMark" ] || apt-mark manual $savedAptMark > /dev/null; 	apt-get purge -y --auto-remove -o APT::AutoRemove::RecommendsImportant=false;
